channel.title: Pets on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Pets on Have an average day :|

item.title: So I adopted some rats.
item.description: So I went and did something really impulsive. My kids have begged for a pet. Paying a pet fee and keeping up with all the other bills that go with dogs & cats are just way more than I can afford. Plus I’m not around enough to make sure they get trained correctly. So that leaves me smaller things. I could have gotten a turtle, hamsters, etc. I opted to get them rats.

item.title: Aww what a cute dog & cat
item.description: Kind of NSFW… but really funny. – http://www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/Erekw.jpg viaReddit. [![When you see it.](https://i0.wp.com/www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/Erekw.jpg?resize=770%2C461 "Aww, what a cute dog & cat.")](http://www.reddit.com/r/sex/comments/uqgw1/i_frantically_called_my_boyfriend_asking_him_to/)Aww, what a cute dog & cat.
